state.state: Type: String; Meaning: State where the issue occurred; all values are 'LA'

DfENumber.DfENumber: Type: Integer; Meaning: Unique identifier for the school assigned by the Department for Education

SchoolName.SchoolName: Type: String; Meaning: Name of the school

Year.Year: Type: Integer; Meaning: Academic year for which the admissions data is reported

Places.Places: Type: Integer; Meaning: Total number of places available for admission

PlaceAllocated.PlaceAllocated: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of places allocated to students

1stPref.1stPref: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students who were allocated a place based on their first preference

2ndPref.2ndPref: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students who were allocated a place based on their second preference

3rdPref.3rdPref: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students who were allocated a place based on their third preference

4thPref.4thPref: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students who were allocated a place based on their fourth preference

5thPref.5thPref: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students who were allocated a place based on their fifth preference

Unplaced.Unplaced: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students who were not placed in any school

SLE.SLE: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated through Special Legislative Entry criteria

Catchment.Catchment: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated from the catchment area

Sibling.Sibling: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated due to having siblings at the school

Distance.Distance: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated based on proximity to the school

OutsideSpecifiedArea.OutsideSpecifiedArea: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated from outside the specified catchment area

InsideSpecifiedArea.InsideSpecifiedArea: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated from inside the specified catchment area

Religion.Religion: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated based on religious criteria

Feeder.Feeder: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated from feeder schools

Other.Other: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of students allocated based on other criteria

Total.Total: Type: Integer; Meaning: Total number of students allocated places, including those allocated through various criteria

Northing coordinate.Northing coordinate: Type: Integer; Meaning: The northing coordinate of the point transect in UTM (Universal Transverse Mercator) system

Ecoregion.Ecoregion: Type: String; Meaning: The ecological region where the observation was made.

Park.Park: Type: String; Meaning: The name of the park where the observation took place.

Point transect name.Point transect name: Type: String; Meaning: The name of the specific point transect within the park.

Point transect identification.Point transect identification: Type: Integer; Meaning: A unique identifier for the point transect.

Elevation (m).Elevation (m): Type: Integer; Meaning: The elevation of the point transect in meters.

Year.Year: Type: Integer; Meaning: The year when the observation was recorded.

Month.Month: Type: Integer; Meaning: The month when the observation was recorded.

Day.Day: Type: Integer; Meaning: The day of the month when the observation was recorded.

Temperature (Celcius).Temperature (Celcius): Type: Float; Meaning: The temperature at the time of observation in degrees Celsius.

Sky condition.Sky condition: Type: String; Meaning: The sky condition at the time of observation (e.g., Clear, Overcast, Scattered).

Wind speed (km/h).Wind speed (km/h): Type: Float; Meaning: The wind speed at the time of observation in kilometers per hour.

Common_Name.Common_Name: Type: String; Meaning: The common name of the bird species observed.

Scientific_Name.Scientific_Name: Type: String; Meaning: The scientific name of the bird species observed.

Number of Birds Detected from 0-3:20 (mi.Number of Birds Detected from 0-3:20 (mi: Type: Integer; Meaning: The number of birds detected during the first 3 minutes and 20 seconds of the observation period.

Number of Birds Detected from 3:20-6:40.Number of Birds Detected from 3:20-6:40: Type: Integer; Meaning: The number of birds detected during the second 3 minutes and 20 seconds of the observation period.

Number of Birds Detected from 6:40-10:00.Number of Birds Detected from 6:40-10:00: Type: Integer; Meaning: The number of birds detected during the last 3 minutes and 20 seconds of the observation period.

Behaviour.Behaviour: Type: String; Meaning: The behavior of the bird observed (e.g., Singing, Calling, Drumming).

Easting coordinate.Easting coordinate: Type: Integer; Meaning: The easting coordinate of the observation location in a UTM projection.

Northing coordinate.Northing coordinate: Type: Integer; Meaning: The northing coordinate of the observation location in a UTM projection.

Category.Category: Type: String; Meaning: The category of the organism or natural community, such as Animal, Plant, or Natural Community.

Taxonomic Group.Taxonomic Group: Type: String; Meaning: The broader taxonomic group the organism belongs to, such as Birds, Dragonflies and Damselflies, or Amphibians.

Taxonomic Subgroup.Taxonomic Subgroup: Type: String; Meaning: A more specific subgroup within the taxonomic group, such as Wrens, Ducks, Geese, Waterfowl, or Salamanders.

Scientific Name.Scientific Name: Type: String; Meaning: The scientific name of the organism, following binomial nomenclature.

Common Name.Common Name: Type: String; Meaning: The common name of the organism, which is often used in everyday language.

Year Last Documented.Year Last Documented: Type: String; Meaning: The year or range of years when the organism was last documented or observed. Some entries may indicate 'not available'.

NY Listing Status.NY Listing Status: Type: String; Meaning: The conservation status of the organism in New York State, such as Endangered, Threatened, or Protected Bird.
